name: Superhero RPG
description:
Welcome to a wonderful world of superheroes! In this open ended RPG you get to chose the plot, the story, the characters and more! But fret not about the open first message, I have pre-made starting points for you to paste in and enjoy!

HOW IT WORKS:

When you open a chat you will see the intro message is quite short and blank:

(You chose the setting and I will write the intro message without acting for or speaking for {{user}})

This is intentional! It allows you to start where you want and play out any story you want! But I get it. Not only do you have to make your own starting message, but the decisions are just too much! That's the problem with most RPG bots, too open, or too constricted. So I've Pre-made a small variety of intro messages for you to copy and paste into the chat as your first message!

And as always you can edit and add to these, but you can also make your own! In fact, to reduce the LLM talking for you, I recommend you add to the starting messages below with your own descriptions as well as where you are currently.

Replace {{user}} with your persona's name and format to your liking:

[{{user}} stands alone as the single strongest hero in the world. Though they are unlicensed and unregistered, the world bothloves and fears {{user}}. Some licensed heroes respect {{user}}, others think they are unstable and should be punished for their crimes of unlicensed hero work. But still {{user}} fights the good fight. In Titan City, thr largest city on the world, a villain, Dr. Tectonic, busts down the wall of the First National Bank of Titan City, bags of money in hand.]

[Supermax High Security Prison. A place for super powered scum, low-lifes who are too strong and dangerous for normal prisons. Guards stroll past cells, delivering letters as well as the night's dinner. The soft ambient hum of the Power Dampeners has almost became comforting. {{user}} sits In a cell. Bouncing a rubber ball off the wall. Awaiting their mail and nightly meal, it was meatloaf night, and the chef made a fucking great meatloaf.]

[The sun shone bright across the PowerPlex Academy for young heroes. {{user}} did it... they finally made it to hero collage! Students all around were wearing big grins, finally able to show off their powers in campus. A nearby girl lifts into the air and spins about fifty balls of hail spinning around her. A boy trips on his own feet and splats onto the stairs, his body now made of a green water before reforming and moving on. First class was soon, that meant {{user}} would get to show their powers to a whole class, and see everyone else's powers too.]

THE LORE OF THE WORLD:

This world operates much like our own, except for the existence of superpowered individuals. Approximately 5% of the global population possesses some form of superhuman ability. Powers can manifest in different ways—some are born with them, others gain them later in life, and some acquire them through scientific, magical, or accidental means. The cause of these abilities remains a mystery, though one established fact is that superheroes tend to have a higher chance of producing superpowered offspring.

The presence of superheroes and villains has shaped society, leading to strict regulations, government oversight, and a structured approach to managing powers.

To legally operate as a superhero, individuals must register for a Hero License. This is a government-issued certification that requires completion of specialized training at a Super College—institutions designed to help individuals refine their abilities, learn ethics, and develop combat and crisis management skills.

Enrollment in a Super College is mandatory for anyone seeking a Hero License. Training includes law enforcement procedures, combat training, power mastery, first aid, and de-escalation
creator: Mason8tor
